author: y4rr
content: Functionally complete via existing 'hf' CLI: user ran 'hf download meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B' and all downstream crates (ferrotorch-serialize sharded loader #507, ferrotorch-llama example #513) consume the HF cache layout directly. A Rust wrapper for hf-token auth + programmatic download would still be nice-to-have for reproducible builds but is not on the critical path for Llama 3 8B inference. Leaving open for the wrapper work.
